name: Christmas Hexa Puzzle
description: Christmas Hexa Puzzle is a relaxing holiday-themed jigsaw game where you arrange vibrant hexagonal tiles to complete festive pictures. Choose between 14-piece and 22-piece puzzle modes, perfect for both quick plays and more challenging sessions. Drag and fit each hexa piece into its correct spot, watch the Christmas scene come to life, and enjoy a cozy, soothing puzzle experience for all ages.
instructions: Use your mouse or touchpad to move and fix the hexagonal tiles to complete the picture
